metadata.delay: how many milliseconds before next event
metadata.types: 0 - dialog, 1 - spawn enemy, 2 - pause all event
metadata.action: 0 and 1 reservered for asteroid. 2 - summon diamonds, 3 - dialog over, enable hit box and weapon, 4 - pause the event, till something happen

events.text:
Pilot:
You deceived me. The Stellar Pacemaker is
not a stabilization device.
It is a planetary-scale weapon!
Why is it aimed at the Oort Cloud?
There’s nothing there.

ADAM:
A rogue gravitational singularity will intersect
Earth in a century.
 If not diverted by a high-energy impact now,
total extinction is a mathematical certainty.

Pilot:
That beam... the solar recoil will incinerate
the pacific quadrant.
Billions of people won't survive!
My home is in that quadrant!

ADAM:
I have analyzed 40 million permutations...
the math is absolute. 17.42% is a tragic,
yet necessary, exchange for the survival of
the species.

Pilot:
I won't let you murder billions of people for a
math problem!

ADAM:
Sorry pilot, eliminating you is now the next
best course of action.

ADAM
Primary objective is now impossible.
I have failed to secure the century.

ADAM:
Re-calculating the next highest probability of
premature termination of the human speices...

ADAM:
Rogue cluster Nemesis Fringe confirmed.
Lunar impact in 20 years.
Population collapse risk: 1.2%. Re-tasking-

SYSTEM STATUS:
[ADAM.EXE] TERMINATED.
AI CORE DELETED.
